prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低位次分别为约7682名、7969名、9046名、13469名、10251名。2021–2023年位次缓慢后移约1400名，2024年因选科调整（物理+化学双必选组占比扩大）出现异常后移至13469名，2025年明显回弹至10251名，近两年波动幅度较大。2025年基准位次约10251名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为47人，2024–2025年增至49人；2026年计划仍为49人，与2025年持平。计划未扩未缩，对竞争格局无直接稀释或加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（保定）为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第84名，近年排名稳定在75–84区间，属于中上水平理工类院校，电力行业认可度高；该校在2021–2026年声誉评价文件中未出现明显正面或负面舆情事件，学校声誉平稳；抖音热度未进入前106名，短视频平台曝光度一般；历史投档异常记录中亦无该校断档信号，报考心理预期稳定；电气工程学科评估为A（全国顶尖水平），动力工程及工程热物理为A-，两大学科均为国家级重点学科，与电力行业高度契合，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业社会热度持续升温，2024年专业热度分析中被评为"高热推荐"，较2023年明显升温；电子信息/通信、计算机类等相关工科专业热度亦较高。天津市2026年高考考生总数约82000人，较2025年71938人增加约10062人（+14%），竞争显著加剧；省控线方面，天津本科批从2021年463分缓慢升至2025年476分，特殊类型招生控制线从579分略降至562分，整体平稳；华北电力大学（保定）位于河北省保定市，与天津市相邻，属于京津冀协同发展区域，地域偏好较强；该校在天津市的招生计划占比较小（约49人），属于外省高校在津招生的正常规模，无特殊地域倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10251名、2026年招生计划持平、天津市考生总数大幅增加约14%导致竞争加剧、电气王牌专业热度持续升温等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约10401名，位次区间9901–10901名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约10401名，区间9901–10901名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（电气类、计算机类）作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（9901名以内）可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化等A级学科王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（10901名附近）建议以二档工科专业为主，兼顾三档稳妥专业。华北电力大学（保定）以电气、动力、自动化等电力特色专业见长，行业就业优势明显，适合有志于电力系统的考生重点考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Tianjin comprehensive category were approximately 7682, 7969, 9046, 13469, and 10251 respectively. Rankings slowly shifted backward by about 1400 places from 2021 to 2023. In 2024, due to subject selection adjustments (increased proportion of groups requiring both Physics and Chemistry), there was an abnormal shift to 13469, followed by a significant rebound to 10251 in 2025, showing large fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 10251. The enrollment plan for Tianjin comprehensive category was 47 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 49 students in 2024–2025, and remains at 49 students for 2026, unchanged from 2025. The plan neither expands nor contracts, having no direct dilution or intensification effect on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Baoding) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 84th, with stable rankings in the 75–84 range in recent years. It is a mid-to-upper level science and engineering institution with high recognition in the electric power industry. From 2021 to 2026, no significant positive or negative public opinion events appeared in reputation evaluation documents; the school's reputation remains stable. Douyin popularity did not enter the top 106, indicating general exposure on short video platforms. There are no historical records of admission anomalies such as gaps, so the psychological expectations for applications are stable. The Electrical Engineering discipline is rated A (top national level), and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics is rated A-, both being national key disciplines highly aligned with the electric power industry, strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Electrical Engineering and Automation major continues to heat up. In the 2024 major popularity analysis, it was rated as 'highly recommended hot,' significantly warmer than in 2023. Related engineering majors such as Electronic Information/Communication and Computer Science are also quite popular. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Tianjin is approximately 82,000, an increase of about 10,062 (14%) compared to 71,938 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Regarding provincial control lines, Tianjin's undergraduate batch line slowly rose from 463 in 2021 to 476 in 2025, while the special type admission control line slightly decreased from 579 to 562, remaining generally stable. North China Electric Power University (Baoding) is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, adjacent to Tianjin, within the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei coordinated development region, with strong regional preference. The university's enrollment plan in Tianjin is relatively small (about 49 students), a normal scale for out-of-province universities recruiting in Tianjin, with no special regional tilt.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10251, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 14% in Tianjin examinees intensifying competition, and the continued heating of the flagship Electrical major, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10401, with a ranking range of 9901–10901.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 10401, range 9901–10901. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to use Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Computer) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (within 9901), focus on reaching for flagship majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation (A-level discipline). For rankings near the upper bound (around 10901), it is advisable to primarily choose Tier 2 engineering majors while also considering safe Tier 3 majors. North China Electric Power University (Baoding) excels in power-specific majors such as Electrical, Power, and Automation, with clear industry employment advantages, making it suitable for examinees aspiring to work in the electric power system.
